channel.title: the economist on lay's 博客
channel.description: Recent content in the economist on lay's 博客

item.title: The state in the time of covid-19
item.description: The state in the time of covid-19

item.title: The Politics of pandemics
item.description: The Politics of pandemics All governments will struggle. Some will struggle more than others

item.title: The right medicine for the world economy
item.description: The right medicine for the world economy Coping with the pandemic involves all of government, not just the health system IT IS NOT a fair fight, but it is a fight that many countries will face all the same. Left to itself, the covid-19 pandemic doubles every five to six days. When you get your next issue of The Economist the outbreak could in theory have infected twice as many people as today.Governments can slow that ferocious(凶猛的) pace, but bureaucratic time is not the same as virus time.( 这句话有点难以理解, 官方的数据和病毒真实的数据不一样) And at the moment governments across the world are being left f
